creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Chris,

you reported a problem with the port www/trac in ports/124455 [1]. Can you
please explain a bit more what the problem is you are seeing? In which way
is which RUN_DEPENDS line incorrect?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/124455
